# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: EC2 Instance and EBS Volumes Template
Resources:
  MyEc2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: ami-xxx # replace with the desired AMI ID
      InstanceType: t2.micro # replace with the desired instance type
      KeyName: mykey # replace with the name of your key pair (create one first)
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda1
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 8 # replace with the desired EBS volume size (in GB)
            DeleteOnTermination: true
        - DeviceName: /data
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 50 # replace with the desired EBS volume size (in GB)
            VolumeType: gp2
            DeleteOnTermination: false
Outputs:
  PublicIP:
    Description: The public IP address of your EC2 instance
    Value: !GetAtt MyEc2Instance.PublicIp
